# zstack_snmp_agent (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SNMP agents in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `port` (Number) SNMP agent port.
- `version` (String) SNMP version.

### Optional

- `auth_algorithm` (String) SNMP authentication algorithm.
- `auth_password` (String, Sensitive) SNMP authentication password.
- `privacy_algorithm` (String) SNMP privacy algorithm.
- `privacy_password` (String, Sensitive) SNMP privacy password.
- `read_community` (String) SNMP read community.
- `user_name` (String) SNMP username.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the SNMP agent.
- `security_level` (String) SNMP security level.
- `status` (String) SNMP agent status.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNMP agent.
